title: SpinReset
description: Hold ALT and right-click an item frame to reset its rotation.
body: ![Spin Reset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b05e84ad7038ea0da8d4b807603ef7e814d3b4e2.png) --- [](https://discord.gg/tqn38v6w7k) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) Spin Reset is a tiny mod that makes it so if you hold down ALT while right-clicking on an item frame, its rotation resets. Good for players who accidentally right click item frames all the time, just to have to click 7 more times to reset it. ## Check out my other mods [](https://modrinth.com/mod/adaptivehud) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/anti-item-break)
